positive: An aesthetically pleasing, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon nestled within a constellation of abstract, stylized forest flora. The main subject is a single, luminous, stylized crescent moon outlined in gold leaf, surrounded by delicate, overgrown jungle leaves, starry geometric patterns, and subtle glowing bioluminescent elements. The composition should feature strong symmetry and a central focal point. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau combined with modern celestial geometry. Color Palette: Deep indigo midnight blue background, accented with matte gold, emerald green, and luminous cyan highlights. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic backlighting emphasizing the silhouette of the leaves against the dark sky. Composition: Highly detailed, symmetrical, vector-style design optimized for apparel printing, clean cut lines, suitable for a repeatable tile pattern.
negative: low quality, amateur, fuzzy, blurry, noise, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, realistic photo, 3d render, bad anatomy, messy, asymmetrical, messy background, excess elements
